name: QuestionnaireAdaptiveExtension
title: Questionnaire Adaptive
description: Marks a questionnaire as being adaptive.  Value can either be a boolean (if true, indicates adaptive) or a URL for the base URL of a server that can perform the nextQuestion operation for this particular questionnaire.

element.short: Marks a questionnaire as being adaptive.
element.definition: Marks a questionnaire as being adaptive.  Value can either be a boolean (if true, indicates adaptive) or a URL for the base URL of a server that can perform the nextQuestion operation for this particular questionnaire.
element.comment: There can only be one in a questionnaire if the value used is boolean.
